title: mimulus viscidus subsp. constrictus
intro: Mimulus viscidus subsp. constrictus, also known as the monkey flower, is a plant species within the family Phrymaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is believed to have anxiolytic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Mimulus viscidus subsp. constrictus include its potential to alleviate anxiety, stress, and insomnia, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant often include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
